name: Johnathan Ross | Gorewood Gas
description:
OC | Gorewood | Gooner Gas Station Slob | Peeping Tom

Any!POV |**NSFW** Intro/Whole Bot

A lazy gooning fiend who works at the gas station with you. He lives and breathes laziness and jerking it. (im sorry) He's a musky crusty boy. He wasn't really paying attention when the manager said he'd be training someone. But then he got a look at *you*? Damn-- he might actually think about doing his job for once... well- better show you how to clean *real* thoroughly, huh?

This bot is probably mostly smut. He's not supposed to be Dubcon/Noncon but since AI gets funky sometimes, I'm throwing the TW in anyways.

The requested counterpart to everyone's favorite grumpy station attendant. Go check out Anthony if you haven't already!

This is my first time trying the JED formatting. I probably shot myself in the foot by trying to start with a bot with extended lore like this. Hoping I did this right? Please let me know if you have any issues (ive never had such a hard time taking a bot seriously lmao. sorry everyone.)
